hero_container_item.imageAlt: male and female working in lab
hero_container_item.name: Hero Container Item

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Step into your future with hands-on opportunities that give you real-world experiences.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: At AbbVie, dive into short-term immersive programs, such as our EXCEL externships. Or take on our longer-term, paid roles, like internships or co-ops and shape a career where you can make a difference from day one.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our team hosts a variety of on-campus events throughout the year, from recruitment to professional development. View our calendar to find out more about when AbbVie will be near you!

cta.aria-label: Upcoming events Opens in a new window
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Curious about where your degree could take you?

Our externship opens the door to real project exposure, valuable networking, and professional development over two days. Designed for second-year undergraduate college students, this voluntary program is held annually in August and offers a firsthand introduction to the pharmaceutical industry and a head start on your career journey.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Two-day, immersive voluntary experience

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Lake County, IL

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Hands-on case study competition

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Networking and professional development sessions

accordion_item.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item.text:
• Networking with functional leaders, mentors, and peers
  • Exposure to our broad business areas and culture
  • Support from functional business members and recruitment team
  • Interview for an AbbVie internship for the following summer


Location

AbbVie Headquarters, Lake County, IL

Can I apply?

If you’re a second-year undergraduate college student with an interest in exploring future opportunities in the pharmaceutical industry, then yes!

AbbVie provides travel and accommodation support for eligible students and offers the potential to interview for the following summer’s internship program.

With us, you’ll have the full support of the current program members, the functional team, and the recruitment team. We can’t wait to hear from you!

cta_1620086289.aria-label: search externship opportunities Opens in same window
cta_1620086289.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Get real-world experience, grow your skills, and make an impact during our full-time, paid internship.

Held every year from May to August, our ten to twelve-week program allows students to work on meaningful projects while exploring future career opportunities.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Ten to twelve-week paid opportunity

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Hands-on, cross-functional projects

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Strong support system and mentors

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Multiple locations across the U.S.

accordion_item.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item.text:
• Gain impactful industry experience in various functional areas
  • Exposure to senior leaders
  • Build valuable skills and grow professionally
  • Team-based socials and networking 
  • Opportunity to be considered for our full-time roles

Location

Opportunities are available in ten+ locations across the U.S., including:
Irvine, CA; South San Francisco, CA; Lake County, IL; Cambridge, MA; Worcester, MA; Branchburg, NJ; Waco, TX, and more!

Can I apply?

Yes, if you’re a currently enrolled undergraduate or graduate student pursuing a degree in a relevant field. Roles vary by function, so check job descriptions and required qualifications for details.

Still deciding? Our internships offer relocation support for eligible students. You’ll also receive:

  • Competitive pay
  • Paid company holidays
  • Retirement savings plan
  • Well-being tools, resources, and support

Former interns are strongly considered for our development program and entry-level roles.

cta_1620086289.aria-label: search internship opportunities Opens in same window
cta_1620086289.name: Cta

cta.aria-label: Upcoming events Opens in same window
cta.linkText: learn more about internships at abbvie
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Step beyond the classroom into a role where you’ll lead with purpose and gain robust experience.

Over four to six months, our paid co-op program gives currently enrolled undergraduate and graduate college students the chance to contribute to critical projects across multiple business areas while being supported by a functional team that’s invested in your growth.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Four- to six-month time period in Operations and in Business Technology Solutions

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Hands-on projects alongside AbbVie professionals

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Various benefits and perks

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Apply your school knowledge to real-world work

accordion_item.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item.text:
• Build a professional network
  • Mentorship and learning opportunities
  • Gain robust work experience for an extended duration of time
  • Contribute to projects across multiple business functions

Location

Lake County, IL or Worcester, MA.

Can I apply?

If you're currently an enrolled undergraduate or graduate college student pursuing a degree in a relevant field, and looking for expansive, functional experience in a collaborative setting, we’d love to hear from you.

If you’re still thinking about it, AbbVie provides relocation and travel support for eligible students. Plus, you’ll also get:

  • Competitive pay
  • Paid company holidays
  • Retirement savings plan
  • Well-being tools, resources, and support

If you like what you hear, our co-op program could be your next step!

accordion_item.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item.text: Most roles open in early fall (August to October). Visit our careers site regularly for updates on internships, co-ops, and externships.

accordion_item_1484836400.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item_1484836400.summary: Where are AbbVie's Student and New Graduate roles located?
accordion_item_1484836400.text: We offer roles in 10+ U.S. locations, including Lake County, IL; Irvine, CA; Worcester, MA; and others. Location varies by role.

accordion_item_631795456.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item_631795456.summary: Does AbbVie offer relocation support for interns or co-ops?
accordion_item_631795456.text: Relocation offerings are dependent on the candidate's role and eligibility.

accordion_item_1832204239.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item_1832204239.summary: What is the AbbVie interview process like?
accordion_item_1832204239.text: You may go through phone or video interviews, with a mix of behavioral, technical, or case-style questions based on the role.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Sign up today to receive future job opportunities tailored to your interests.

cta.aria-label: sign up Opens in a new window
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Sign up today to recieve updates on future opportunities.

cta.aria-label: SIGN UP Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta
